---
title: "Alex Copeland"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| echo: false

sports <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2022/2022-03-29/sports.csv', show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{R}
#| echo: false

# Subset data into only Division 1 sch
d1 <- sports[sports$classification_name == "NCAA Division I-FBS" | sports$classification_name == "NCAA Division I-FCS" | sports$classification_name == "NCAA Division I without football", ]

# Define "empty" sector column
d1$sector <- "Other"

# Add new column for Public or Private
d1$sector[d1$sector_name == "Public, 4-year or above"] <- "Public"
d1$sector[d1$sector_name == "Private nonprofit, 4-year or above" | d1$sector_name == "Private for-profit, 4-year or above"] <- "Private"
```

```{R}

foo <- aggregate(total_rev_menwomen ~ institution_name, data = d1, mean, na.rm = TRUE)

foo2 <-  d1[d1$institution_name == "University of Wisconsin-Madison", ]

```
